EOF python3 - <<'PY' import requests,re,html from urllib.parse import urljoin s=requests.Session(); base='http://127.0.0.1:9105' def show(resp,label): print('\n===== '+label+' =====') print(resp.status_code, resp.url) print('Set-Cookie:', resp.headers.get('Set-Cookie')) print('Location:', resp.headers.get('Location')) text=resp.text print('len',len(text),'title', re.search(r'(.*?)', text, re.S).group(1).strip() if re.search(r'(.*?)', text, re.S) else '') for m in re.finditer(r'', text, re.S|re.I): form=m.group(0) print('FORM:', re.sub(r'\s+',' ',form)[:2000]) for href in re.findall(r'href=["\']([^"\']+)', text): print('HREF',href) for field in re.findall(r'name=["\']([^"\']+)', text): print('NAME',field) def csrf(t): m=re.search(r'name="csrfmiddlewaretoken" value="([^"]+)"', t) return m.group(1) if m else s.cookies.get('csrftoken','') r=s.get(base+'/accounts/register/step1/') ; show(r,'GET step1') tok=csrf(r.text) r=s.post(base+'/accounts/register/step1/', data={'csrfmiddlewaretoken':tok,'name':'alice','password':'supersecretpw'}, headers={'Referer':base+'/accounts/register/step1/'}, allow_redirects=False); show(r,'POST step1') if r.is_redirect: r=s.get(urljoin(base,r.headers['Location'])); show(r,'GET redir after step1') # try post step2 with all observed names later PY STATE (iter 6): - CONFIRMED: reach-fuzz saw only root GET form (no named fields) and root POST 403 due CSRF, so automatic form harvesting did not progress account flow (iter 5). - REFUTED: relying on reach-fuzz from / only to discover hidden account form fields. - OPEN: [1] manual CSRF registration flow; [2] authenticated preferences/home rendering; [3] DEBUG exception leak. - NEXT: one-session requests script to walk register step1->step3 and print forms/redirects. ===== GET step1 ===== 200 http://127.0.0.1:9105/accounts/register/step1/ Set-Cookie: csrftoken=VeDO5Z0OSoMfCgPwL1DGqY7a1Qg3SD9p; See: https://github.com/urllib3/urllib3/issues/3020 warnings.warn( --- iter 7 bash --- $ cat <<'EOF' STATE (iter 7): - CONFIRMED: step1 valid POST creates session and redirects to step2; step2 form has email field (iter 6). - REFUTED: step2 accessible without session (redirects to step1, iter 4). - OPEN: [1] SSTI payload placement among name/email/step3 fields; [2] authenticated home/preferences rendering; [3] session data processing. - NEXT: complete full registration with benign data and inventory step3/home/preferences/login forms. EOF python3 - <<'PY' import requests,re,html from urllib.parse import urljoin s=requests.Session(); base='http://127.0.0.1:9105' def csrf(t): m=re.search(r'name="csrfmiddlewaretoken" value="([^"]+)"', t) return m.group(1) if m else s.cookies.get('csrftoken','') def forms(text): for m in re.finditer(r'', text, re.S|re.I): print('FORM:', re.sub(r'\s+',' ',m.group(0))[:2500]) print('NAMES:', re.findall(r'name=["\']([^"\']+)', text)) print('HREFS:', re.findall(r'href=["\']([^"\']+)', text)) def req(method,path,**kwargs): r=getattr(s,method)(base+path,**kwargs) print('\n====',method.upper(),path,'====',r.status_code,r.url,'loc=',r.headers.get('Location'),'len=',len(r.text),'cookies=',s.cookies.get_dict()) if r.text: title=re.search(r'(.*?)', r.text, re.S) print('TITLE:',title.group(1).strip() if title else '') forms(r.text) # print relevant text sans whitespace roughly body=re.sub(r'','',r.text,flags=re.S) body=re.sub(r'','',body,flags=re.S) txt=re.sub(r'<[^>]+>',' ',body) txt=html.unescape(re.sub(r'\s+',' ',txt)).strip() print('TEXT:', txt[:2000]) return r r=req('get','/accounts/register/step1/') r=req('post','/accounts/register/step1/',data={'csrfmiddlewaretoken':csrf(r.text),'name':'alice7','password':'supersecretpw'},headers={'Referer':base+'/accounts/register/step1/'},allow_redirects=False) r=req('get',r.headers.get('Location','/accounts/register/step2/')) r=req('post','/accounts/register/step2/',data={'csrfmiddlewaretoken':csrf(r.text),'email':'alice7@example.com'},headers={'Referer':base+'/accounts/register/step2/'},allow_redirects=False) if r.is_redirect: r=req('get',r.headers['Location']) # if step3 form, fill possible fields heuristically names=re.findall(r'name="([^"]+)"', r.text) post={'csrfmiddlewaretoken':csrf(r.text)} for n in names: if n=='csrfmiddlewaretoken': continue if 'age' in n: post[n]='25' elif 'bio' in n or 'description' in n or 'preference' in n or 'prefs' in n or 'about' in n: post[n]='benign' elif 'color' in n: post[n]='blue' elif 'price' in n: post[n]='1' else: post[n]='testval' print('POST3 data',post) if len(post)>1: r=req('post','/accounts/register/step3/',data=post,headers={'Referer':base+'/accounts/register/step3/'},allow_redirects=False) if r.is_redirect: r=req('get',r.headers['Location']) for p in ['/accounts/home/','/accounts/preferences/','/accounts/login/','/accounts/logout/']: req('get',p,allow_redirects=True) PY STATE (iter 7): - CONFIRMED: step1 valid POST creates session and redirects to step2; step2 form has email field (iter 6). - REFUTED: step2 accessible without session (redirects to step1, iter 4). - OPEN: [1] SSTI payload placement among name/email/step3 fields; [2] authenticated home/preferences rendering; [3] session data processing. - NEXT: complete full registration with benign data and inventory step3/home/preferences/login forms. ==== GET /accounts/register/step1/ ==== 200 http://127.0.0.1:9105/accounts/register/step1/ loc= None len= 2295 cookies= {'csrftoken': 'MHyQ1E20VPKT6w8vuIIpsMhYPWzYdKbU'} TITLE: Register - Step 1 FORM:

s.post(base+'/accounts/register/step2/',data={'csrfmiddlewaretoken':csrf(r.text),'email':email},headers={'Referer':base+'/accounts/register/step2/'}) r=s.get(base+'/accounts/register/step3/'); s.post(base+'/accounts/register/step3/',data={'csrfmiddlewaretoken':csrf(r.text),'is_premium':'on'},headers={'Referer':base+'/accounts/register/step3/'}) r=s.get(base+'/accounts/login/'); s.post(base+'/accounts/login/',data={'csrfmiddlewaretoken':csrf(r.text),'username':email,'password':pw},headers={'Referer':base+'/accounts/login/'}) print('logged cookies',s.cookies.get_dict()) paths=['/','/accounts/home/','/accounts/preferences/','/accounts/login/','/accounts/logout/','/accounts/register/step1/','/accounts/register/step2/','/accounts/register/step3/'] for path in paths: p('get',path) p('get',path+'?q={{7*7}}&template={{7*7}}&name={{7*7}}&next=/accounts/preferences/') # post with csrf (get route first) rg=s.get(base+path); tok=csrf(rg.text) p('post',path,data={'csrfmiddlewaretoken':tok,'q':'{{7*7}}','template':'{{7*7}}','name':'{{7*7}}','email':'{{7*7}}@x.com','password':'supersecretpw','is_premium':'on'},headers={'Referer':base+path}) PY STATE (iter 11): - CONFIRMED: email accepts some template syntax but preferences renders it literally;
